core_identity.essence: A modern European powerhouse where fashion, design, business, and culture merge into a fast, elegant urban rhythm.
core_identity.city_feeling: Milan feels polished, ambitious, stylish, and forward-moving — a city driven by aesthetics, success, and contemporary culture.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Fashion district buzz, espresso machines, tram movement, business conversations, and nightlife energy.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Modern architecture, luxury storefronts, elegant streets, glass buildings, and curated aesthetic spaces.

match_narratives.high_match: Milan may strongly resonate with you if you are drawn to stylish, modern, and ambitious environments where aesthetics and progress shape everyday life. You likely enjoy fashion, design, urban sophistication, and cities that feel polished and forward-moving. Milan rewards people who appreciate structure, elegance, and contemporary culture.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Milan during phases where you seek inspiration, style, and urban energy. It works well for travelers who enjoy a balance of culture, shopping, food, and fast-paced exploration.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you strongly prefer slow travel, nature immersion, emotional warmth, or chaotic authenticity, Milan may feel too structured, business-oriented, or emotionally distant.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A city where style is a way of life.

possible_downsides: Can feel expensive and commercial in central areas
Less emotional warmth than southern Italian cities
Fast pace may feel overwhelming for slow travelers
Limited natural landscapes inside the city
Some areas feel more business-focused than atmospheric

winter.description: Winter in Milan feels structured, elegant, and indoor-focused with strong café culture and fashion energy.

spring.description: Spring brings balance and elegance, making Milan feel lively, stylish, and comfortable for exploration.

summer.description: Summer is warm and active but can feel intense and humid, with a mix of nightlife and quieter business rhythm.

autumn.description: Autumn enhances Milan’s elegance and creative energy, making it ideal for fashion, design, and cultural exploration.

solo_trip.description: Good for independent travelers focused on style, culture, and urban exploration.

couple_trip.description: Works well for couples who enjoy stylish experiences, restaurants, and modern city energy.

friends_trip.description: Great for group trips focused on shopping, nightlife, and urban lifestyle experiences.

creative_escape.description: Strong inspiration for fashion, design, architecture, and modern creativity.

emotional_reset.description: Better for stimulation and inspiration than emotional calm or recovery.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Good infrastructure and strong professional environment, especially for creative industries.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Milan feels like walking through a living design magazine.
